title: syndesmanthus flosculosus
intro: Syndesmanthus flosculosus, also known as the "synedrella", is a type of flowering plant in the Asteraceae family, native to Southeast Asia. The plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in China, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Syndesmanthus flosculosus include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an antiseptic to prevent infection. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being applied topically to wounds and skin irritations.
